description: A painting depicting a small, blue-gray wooden cottage with a dark roof in the foreground, surrounded by a wooden picket fence and a taller board fence. Behind and towering above the humble cottage, large multi-story buildings rise — their facades rendered in muted browns and grays with a few yellow-lit windows. The sky is overcast and gray. A solitary dark figure stands near the fence at the right. The composition emphasizes the stark contrast between the small, traditional wooden house and the looming modern buildings behind it.
